semantic.role: Engine module that builds a typed dependency graph (knowledge graph) of project modules, deriving module identity, architectural layers, and structural relationships from file paths and architectural rules.
responsibilities: Define the KnowledgeGraphNode, KnowledgeGraphEdge, and KnowledgeGraph data structures that represent module metadata and relationships.
Provide getModuleId() to derive a canonical module identifier and root-relative path from any file path.
Provide buildGraph() to scan an index directory, apply architectural rules, and construct the full knowledge graph of the project.
outOfScope: Does not handle LLM interactions, CLI command processing, service orchestration, or view rendering.
Does not perform scanning of the actual source files; it works on pre-processed index data.
invariants: Must not import CLI entrypoint modules (e.g., src/cli/*) or service orchestration modules (src/services/*). Currently satisfies this invariant.
Must remain a pure analysis engine: no side effects beyond file I/O for reading index data and rules.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provides a reusable, decoupled engine for constructing and querying the project's module dependency graph, enabling downstream analyses such as cycle detection, impact assessment, and architecture validation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of a broader refactoring that removed legacy CLI aliases and rebuilt documentation; no direct behavioral changes observed in this file.

publicSurface.description: Transforms a file path into a module identifier and root-relative path for indexing the graph.
Main entry point: reads the index directory and architectural rules, then builds and returns a complete KnowledgeGraph object.
Interface describing a node in the graph, including module id, path, layer, role, and responsibilities.
Interface describing a directional edge between two nodes, capturing dependency relationships.
Interface representing the complete graph with nodes, edges, and metadata.

English.role: Engine module that builds a typed dependency graph (knowledge graph) of project modules, deriving module identity, architectural layers, and structural relationships from file paths and architectural rules.
responsibilities: Define the KnowledgeGraphNode, KnowledgeGraphEdge, and KnowledgeGraph data structures that represent module metadata and relationships.
Provide getModuleId() to derive a canonical module identifier and root-relative path from any file path.
Provide buildGraph() to scan an index directory, apply architectural rules, and construct the full knowledge graph of the project.
outOfScope: Does not handle LLM interactions, CLI command processing, service orchestration, or view rendering.
Does not perform scanning of the actual source files; it works on pre-processed index data.

exports.name: buildGraph
exports.signature:
buildGraph(
  indexDir: string,
  rules: SpineRuleDocument[] = [],
  rootDir?: string,
)
